description: Blue Canyon Toothbrush Holder is made of high-quality material. This toothbrush holder is store small bathroom accessories to keep the bathroom tidy, keeps all toothbrushes well organized. It is durable, easy to disassemble and wash. Suitable for any bag, purse or backpack. Use a toothbrush case to keep your toothbrush clean and as dirt-free as possible.
